title: Automated Triage: Ransomware Proceeds Laundering — Chen Hao Yang
description: Subject is linked to cryptocurrency wallets flagged by Chainalysis as ransomware-related. SGD 1.2M in fiat conversions through local exchange within 14 days, followed by rapid disbursement to 8 personal accounts. Digital forensics indicate wallet cluster associated with LockBit 4.0 affiliate programme. ICA checkpoint CMR filed 15/03/2026: USD 95,000 cash declared on arrival from Hong Kong.

factors.notes: High — wallet cluster flagged by Chainalysis as LockBit 4.0 affiliate
High — SGD 1.2M fiat conversion within 14 days
High — disbursement to 8 accounts within 72 hours of conversion
High — crypto-to-fiat conversion pattern consistent with ransomware cashout
High — IT freelancer with SGD 1.2M inflow; declared annual income SGD 72,000
Medium — 8 disbursements across different banks below threshold
Medium — HKG→SGD fiat corridor
Medium — disbursement recipients unrelated to subject
Medium — exchange account opened 3 weeks before first large deposit
Low — Hong Kong (not high-risk but relevant corridor)

reports.narrative: Ransomware proceeds laundering: SGD 1.2M crypto-to-fiat conversion via local exchange, disbursed to 8 unrelated accounts within 72 hours. Wallet cluster linked to LockBit 4.0 affiliate programme per Chainalysis. Filed under CDSA s.39 + Computer Misuse Act.
USD 95,000 cash declared on arrival from Hong Kong. Subject stated purpose as 'personal investment.' No supporting documentation.

title: Automated Triage: Offshore Tax Evasion / Undeclared Trust — Margaret Tan Siew Bee
description: Subject maintains undeclared offshore trust structures in BVI and Labuan with estimated assets of SGD 8.5M. IRAS referral flagged unreported foreign-sourced income exceeding SGD 2M annually for FY2023–2025. Trust distributions routed through nominee accounts in Singapore before conversion to physical gold and safe deposit box storage. No income tax filings for offshore structures.

factors.notes: High — 3 BVI trusts + 2 Labuan holding companies with nominee directors
High — SGD 8.5M estimated assets in undeclared offshore structures
High — IRAS referral for unreported foreign-sourced income FY2023–2025
High — trust distributions → nominee accounts → physical gold conversion
High — BVI + Labuan + Singapore multi-jurisdictional layering
Medium — declared rental income SGD 180,000/yr vs. estimated offshore assets SGD 8.5M
Medium — BVI and Labuan (secrecy jurisdictions)
Medium — nominee account holders acting as intermediaries
Medium — 3 safe deposit boxes at 2 institutions; gold bars stored
Medium — knowledge of AML controls and structuring avoidance

reports.narrative: Undeclared offshore trust structures (BVI/Labuan) with SGD 8.5M assets. Trust distributions laundered through nominee accounts and converted to physical gold stored in safe deposit boxes. IRAS referral for unreported foreign income FY2023–2025. Filed under Income Tax Act s.96 + CDSA s.39.
